name: ACME UNITED CORP
summary: Acme United Corporation is a leading worldwide supplier of innovative first aid and medical products and cutting technology. Principal products include first aid kits, scissors, shears, knives, and sharpening tools sold under brands such as First Aid Only, Westcott, Clauss, DMT, Spill Magic, and PhysiciansCare. The company serves school, home, office, hardware, sporting goods, and industrial markets with operations in the United States, Canada, Germany, Hong Kong, and China. Total net sales in 2025 were $196.5 million.
